<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception; use Symfony\Contracts\HttpClient\ResponseInterface; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class ProviderException extends RuntimeException implements ProviderExceptionInterface { private string $debug; public function __construct( string $message, private ResponseInterface $response, int $code = 0, ?\Exception $previous = null, ) { $this->debug = $response->getInfo('debug') ?? ''; parent::__construct($message, $code, $previous); } public function getResponse(): ResponseInterface { return $this->response; } public function getDebug(): string { return $this->debug; } }
